LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MATTER WAS CONTINUED ON NOVEMBER 17, 2014 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302. COURTESY COPIES HAVE NOT BEEN RECEIVED IN DEPARTMENT 302 AND THEREFORE THE MOTION IS DENIED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Motion And Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Memorandum In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUBECON GENERAL CONTRACTING, INC'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment is DENIED. Matter was continued on November 17, 2014 to give Plaintiff an opportunity to comply with local rule 2.6B and deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302. Courtesy copies have not been received in Department 302 and therefore the motion is denied. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Motion And Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Memorandum In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Continued To Dec-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF RUBECON GENERAL CONTRACTING, INC'S Motion To Set Aside Default and Judgment is continued to December 17, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
